landing.heroDescription: BookGen uses cutting-edge Artificial Intelligence to help you structure, write, and manage your literary works. From initial briefing to final manuscript.
landing.featuresSubtitle: Intelligent tools designed for modern writers seeking efficiency and quality.
landing.featureAiStructuringDesc: Generate outlines and chapter structures based on your initial briefing in seconds.
landing.featureAssistedWritingDesc: Overcome writer's block with real-time content suggestions and idea expansion.
landing.featureLibraryManagementDesc: Organize all your projects, drafts, and versions in one intuitive dashboard.
landing.featureN8nProcessingDesc: Powerful integration with automation workflows to generate high-quality literary previews.
landing.featureInstantFeedbackDesc: Receive analysis on tone, pacing, and narrative coherence as you write.
landing.featureFlexibleExportDesc: Prepare your book for publication in multiple formats with just a few clicks.
landing.ctaDescription: Don't leave your stories only in your imagination. Use BookGen to bring your books to life today.

hero.subtitle1: Create, customize, and publish professional books with AI in minutes.
hero.subtitle2: Cover, translation, and Amazon publishing. No prior experience needed.
hero.trustLine: Less than 1 hour · Without writing a word · 100% your copyright

dream.headline1: The idea that's been in your head
dream.subtitle: It wasn't a lack of talent. It wasn't a lack of content. It was a lack of a tool that did the heavy lifting for you.
dream.typeADesc: "Someday I'll write that book." Years go by, the idea stays in your head, never makes it to paper.
dream.typeBDesc: Log into the platform, describe the idea, and in less than 1 hour have the book ready to publish on Amazon.
dream.microCtaText: Over 100,000 books created in 180 countries. The next one could be yours.

social.testimonial1Quote: I never thought I'd be able to write a book. In less than 1 hour I had mine ready, with a cover, structured from start to finish. It looks like it was made by a professional.
social.testimonial2Quote: I always wanted to share my work method in a book, but never had time to write. I described my idea and the AI did everything. Today my book is on Amazon and has become an authority in my market.
social.testimonial3Quote: What surprised me most was the quality of the content. It's not generic text — it's my book, with my voice and my topic. I made sure to review it and changed very little.

howItWorks.subtitle: No learning curve. No technical knowledge. Just you and your story.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Enter the topic, genre, target audience, and language. Our AI understands the context and structures your project in seconds.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Advanced language models generate a complete 30K+ word book, structured, coherent, and reviewed.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Choose from 6 AI-generated cover variations. Add internal images and translate into 30+ languages.
howItWorks.step4Desc: Download your book in DOCX + PDF instantly. If you want to go further, our team handles the complete Amazon publishing — ISBN, formatting, and everything else.

valueAnchor.headline1: The service that used to cost
valueAnchor.subtitle: Ghostwriters charge a fortune to do what our AI does in minutes. You keep all the credit — and all the profit.
valueAnchor.physicalDesc: After publishing on Amazon, you can order physical copies of your own book. Amazon prints and delivers directly to your address — no minimum stock, no extra cost.
valueAnchor.ctaSub: No mandatory subscription · No credit card

faq.contactPrompt: Didn't find what you're looking for?
faq.q1: Do I need to know how to write to use the platform?
faq.a1: No. You don't write a single word. Just describe your idea — topic, audience, style — and our AI creates the complete book for you. It's like having a professional ghostwriter available 24/7.
faq.q2: How long until my book is ready?
faq.a2: Less than 1 hour. From zero to a complete book with 30,000+ words, structured and reviewed. If you want a custom cover and translation, add 10–15 more minutes.
faq.a3: Yes. You are the author and full owner of the generated content. Best Sellers AI claims no rights over your book. You can publish, sell, and distribute as you wish.
faq.a4: With one-time purchases, your credits never expire. With subscriptions: Autor Aspirante (credits expire every month), Autor BestSeller (credits accumulate for 1 month), and Autor Elite (credits accumulate for 3 months).
faq.q5: Can I cancel at any time?
faq.a5: Yes. No penalty, no questions asked. You can cancel your subscription at any time from your dashboard, with immediate effect.
faq.q6: Can I use the generated content commercially?
faq.a6: Starting from the Autor BestSeller plan and with BestSeller Mundial, you have a full commercial use license — you can publish, sell, and use the content in your business.
faq.q7: Does the platform work in other languages?
faq.a7: Yes. We support creation and translation in 30+ languages, including Portuguese, Spanish, English, French, German, and many more.
faq.q8: Is my book cover truly unique?
faq.a8: Yes. We generate 6 exclusive cover variations for your book using state-of-the-art image generation models. Each cover is created specifically for your title.
faq.q9: Is Amazon publishing included in the plans?
faq.a9: Publishing is a specialized service charged separately in credits. With the Standard plan (700 credits), our team handles everything: professional formatting, Amazon KDP publishing, ISBN, and cataloging. The BestSeller Mundial plan (1,000 credits) goes further: distribution also on Kobo and Draft2Digital, premium formatting, SEO optimization, and priority support.
faq.q10: Can I create and preview my book for free?
faq.a10: Yes. You can create your project and preview your book for free, without a credit card. To generate and download the final version, you'll need credits.

footerCta.subtitle: Create previews of your book for free and only pay when you're ready to move forward. Just you, your idea, and the most advanced AI in the publishing market.

footer.brandDesc: The AI platform to create, customize, and publish professional books.
